case_title: JUNG KYU KIM VS. GAIL WILKERSON et al

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL ON SEP-10-2012 OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT GRANTED, PENDING WRITTEN ORDER.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIM, JUNG KYU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILKERSON, GAIL WILKERSON, GERALD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 525 7TH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94103 $6,246.53 RENT, $2,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $618.70 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,865.23, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC (TOTAL PAST-DUE RENT $11,346.53 LESS $5,100.00 CREDIT FOR SECURITY DEPOSIT = $6,246.53)

calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-10-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Dept. 501 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Katy Bersamin #11722.

Jee Soo Kim, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff: Jung Kyu Kim, placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendants Gail Wilkerson and Gerald Wilkerson.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 525 7th Street, San Francisco, CA.
Back-due rent and damages $11,346.53
Costs $618.70
Attorney Fees $2,000.00
Less security deposit $5,100.00, for a Total of $8,865.23
Counsel to prepare judgment and submit to Dept. 514 for signature.

Judgment was submitted and signed by Judge Sullivan on 09-19-12.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Sep-10-2012 Assigned To Trial Court
